title: Modi To Inaugurate Two Delhi Metro Sections On March 8
description: The Majlis Park-Maujpur-Babarpur corridor is 12.3 km long and includes eight elevated stations. It forms part of the Majlis Park-Shiv Vihar Pink Line, and with the addition of this stretch the Pink Line’s total length will increase to about 71.56 km, creating what the state government described as the country’s first fully operational Ring Metro.
